workflow.hint: Browse the catalog → Compare specs → Match by scenario → Refine prompts—as the catalog grows

landing.metaDescription: Swift Horse (swifthorseai.com) — an independent open index of China's leading AI models for global teams: catalog, scenario matching, and prompt tools.
landing.heroSubtitle: A curated index of China's top AI models—browse by provider or use case, compare specs, and narrow your shortlist.
landing.heroVideoCaption: Speed and depth · Independent index engine
landing.modulesSubtitle: From discovery to scenario matching—search, compare, and use tools in one place.
landing.pipelineSubtitle: Browse → Compare → Match → Prompts—one connected flow. Not a substitute for official docs or live testing, but helps you narrow candidates faster.

pipelineSteps.title: Browse & filter
pipelineSteps.desc: Browse the catalog by provider or use case; review parameters and typical applications.

pipelineSteps.title: Side-by-side compare
pipelineSteps.desc: Select 2–3 models and compare public specs, access options, and cost references.

pipelineSteps.title: Guided matching
pipelineSteps.desc: Describe your scenario in plain language and get an editorial shortlist based on your constraints.

pipelineSteps.title: Prompts & validation
pipelineSteps.desc: Refine prompts with our tools, then validate with small-scale tests before you decide.

landing.ctaSubtitle: All content is compiled from public sources for research only—not official recommendations or buying advice.

catalog.noScenarioModels: No models match this use case.
catalog.pageSubtitle: Search the index by provider or use case; open a card for specs, capabilities, and typical applications.

model.pricingNotice: Pricing and specifications are compiled from public sources for reference only. Confirm current rates and limits on each provider's official site before use.

commercialIndex.pageSubtitle: Compare public specifications, then verify details on each provider's official site
commercialIndex.disclosureBody: Parameter summaries are compiled from public vendor materials for side-by-side review. They are not certifications, endorsements, or live quotes. Always confirm the latest information on each provider's official site before production use.
commercialIndex.compareHint: Select 2–3 models to compare parameters (public reference data only).
commercialIndex.objectiveFootnote: Table summarizes public references; not an official or third-party benchmark certification.
commercialIndex.pickAtLeastTwo: Select at least 2 models to show the comparison table.
commercialIndex.resourcesSubtitle: Neutral links to on-site profiles and each provider's public documentation.
commercialIndex.verifyNote: Confirm API access, pricing, and terms directly with the vendor.

guideSteps.title: Compare specs
guideSteps.desc: Use the table above for context length, pricing references, and capability notes from public sources.

guideSteps.title: Read the model profile
guideSteps.desc: Open the model page for use cases, parameters, and editorial summaries.

guideSteps.title: Verify with the vendor
guideSteps.desc: Confirm API availability, regions, pricing, and enterprise options on the provider's official site.

modelMatch.pageSubtitle: Get an editorial shortlist based on your use case and constraints—not an official recommendation
modelMatch.topBanner: 🔍 Reference tool · Results are for guidance only
modelMatch.selectHint: Select an option above to continue
modelMatch.resultsHint: Only models that meet every answer you provided are listed (up to three). If the list is empty, no entry in the current rule set satisfies all constraints.
modelMatch.feedbackThanks: Thanks for your feedback—we’ll keep improving the rules.
modelMatch.disclaimerBody:
1. Results are generated from Swift Horse editorial rules and public information—for reference only, not official recommendations, “best pick” advice, or performance guarantees.
2. Match labels (high / mid-high / medium) are relative references, not third-party leaderboard rankings; real outcomes vary by scenario, prompts, and model version.
3. Cost references come from vendor pricing pages; actual billing may differ. Verify deployment and compliance requirements yourself.
4. Run small-scale tests before production or procurement; rely on each provider’s official docs and terms.
5. Swift Horse is an independent directory with no affiliation or agency relationship with listed vendors.

modelMatchChat.pageSubtitle: Describe your needs in natural language; the panel updates matching results in real time (not official recommendations)
modelMatchChat.welcome:
Hi! I'm the Swift Horse assistant. Tell me what you're building and I'll suggest models worth considering.
Example: "Southeast Asia e-commerce support bot, about 5,000 calls per day, tight budget"
modelMatchChat.inputPlaceholder: Describe use case, languages, call volume, budget…
modelMatchChat.clearedReply: Previous results cleared. Describe your needs again for a fresh shortlist.
modelMatchChat.panelEmpty: Describe your needs on the left; recognized fields will appear here
modelMatchChat.panelAnalyzing: Tell us your primary use case in the chat. Only requirements you mention are used for matching.
modelMatchChat.profileEditHint: Only fields mentioned in the chat are shown and matched—you can correct them below
modelMatchChat.noStrictMatch: No model in the rule set satisfies every condition from your chat. Relax one constraint (use the dropdowns) or add more detail and try again.
modelMatchChat.compareHint: High / medium / low labels are editorial references, not certified benchmark scores
modelMatchChat.readyReply: Matching results are ready in the right panel. They are rule-based references only—please validate with real tests before deciding.

followUp.scenario: What is your primary use case? e.g. support chat, coding, content, or translation.
followUp.deployment: Do you need on-prem/private deployment, or is cloud API fine?
followUp.language: Which users do you serve—Chinese, English, or multilingual?
followUp.budget: What is your approximate monthly API budget?
followUp.volume: Roughly how many API calls per day?

examples: Code assistant, about 5,000 calls per day
Cross-border support in Chinese and English, $200/month budget
Marketing copy in Chinese, low call volume

promptTool.pageSubtitle: Already have a draft? Use the optimizer. Starting from scratch? Use the chat builder—two workflows that complement each other.
promptTool.disclaimer: Demo tool only. Generated prompts are for reference—adjust for your real use case.
promptTool.disclaimerApi: Optimization and chat run via a server-side AI model API. Do not submit sensitive or confidential data.
promptTool.apiLocalFallback: Without an API key, the local rule engine is used (set PROMPT_API_KEY in .env).
promptTool.optimizeInputHintApi: AI optimizes as you type (~1s), or click Optimize now
promptTool.tabOptimizeDesc: For existing drafts: paste your prompt, auto-optimize, and compare before vs after.
promptTool.tabChatDesc: For blank slates: 5-round guided chat to express needs and generate a structured prompt.
promptTool.complementaryNote: Optimizer refines what you have; chat builder creates from scratch—they complement each other.
promptTool.optimizeInputHint: Type below—optimization runs automatically (~0.5s) with a live before/after view
promptTool.optimizePlaceholder: e.g. Write a product description highlighting value for money…
promptTool.beforeEmpty: Your original prompt appears here after you type above
promptTool.optimizeEmpty: Optimized output will appear here once you enter a prompt
promptTool.apiFallbackNote: API unavailable—fell back to local rules
promptTool.clearedReply: Chat and prompt preview cleared. Describe your needs again and I'll build a new prompt.
promptTool.previewHint: Updates after each round; copy the full prompt when done
promptTool.previewEmpty: Structured prompt preview will appear as you chat
promptTool.completeHint: ✓ All 5 rounds complete—copy the full prompt on the right
promptTool.copyFailed: Copy failed — long-press the text below to copy manually

about.pageSubtitle: An independent index of China's leading AI models—built on collaboration, transparency, and technical depth for readers worldwide.
about.heroTagline: China AI Model Index · Open Index
about.heroImageAlt: Tech-academic scene—neural network visualization on ultrawide display, books and cool cyan lighting, AI model index
about.valuesSubheading: Three principles behind every index entry

values.title: Open collaboration
values.body: We work like an open-source community: public curation, continuous updates, and corrections welcome. The index is built for global readers—not a closed corporate brochure.

values.title: Transparent by design
values.body: Every index entry traces back to public sources. Match and compare results show scoring and filter rules—no black-box picks. We're not official vendor docs, but we label sources and update cadence so you can verify yourself.

values.title: Technical depth
values.body: From parameters and context windows to deployment and pricing—we focus on dimensions engineers actually need, not marketing copy.

storyParagraphs: Swift Horse started from a simple observation: China's AI model ecosystem moves fast, but public information for a global audience is often scattered, stale, or hard to compare.
We set out to organize that information into a verifiable, actionable index.
This site offers no official endorsements and sells no model services. Our job is to reduce search cost—help you narrow candidates faster, then validate with your own tests.
about.networkImageAlt: Abstract decentralized network topology—thin glowing lines and nodes on white, transparency and open interconnection
about.networkCaptionLocal: Open interconnection · Information you can verify
about.storyQuote: Independent index. Verifiable sources. Your call.
about.storyQuoteLocal: We organize public data—you verify and decide.
about.contactSubtitle: Maintained by real developers, in the open
about.contactBody: Swift Horse is maintained by a small team, in public. Issues, PRs, and data corrections welcome—every contribution becomes part of a visible changelog.
about.portraitImageAlt: Developer at night, multiple monitors, warm screen glow—building in public

legal.pageSubtitle: Please read before using this site
legal.nonOfficialBody: Swift Horse is an independent information directory. We are not affiliated with, sponsored by, endorsed by, or acting on behalf of DeepSeek, Alibaba Cloud, Zhipu AI, Moonshot AI, ByteDance, or any other company or model listed on this site. Product names and trademarks belong to their respective owners.
legal.contentBody: Model descriptions, parameters, pricing, and scenario picks are compiled from publicly available materials and editorial analysis. We do not guarantee completeness, accuracy, or timeliness. Always verify on official provider documentation before making production or purchasing decisions.
legal.noAdviceBody: Nothing on this site constitutes legal, financial, or technical advice. Use of any model is subject to each provider's terms of service, acceptable use policy, and applicable law in your jurisdiction.

articles.pageSubtitle: Model comparisons, scenario notes, and index usage—structured for search and citation.
articles.empty: No guides yet. Check back soon.
articles.disclaimer: Editorial content for reference only—not vendor certification or procurement advice. Confirm specs and pricing on official docs.

footer.disclaimer: Independent directory. Not affiliated with listed AI providers.
footer.trademark: All product names and trademarks are the property of their respective owners.
footer.dataDisclaimer: Data compiled from public sources for reference only; prices and specs may change without notice.
footer.indexTagline: An open index of China's AI models for global teams · swifthorseai.com
